meta.problem_text:
A/R is part of cashflow performance. In 2016,  36.20% of total A/R overdue in ID03 was trigger by PT Smart, so we will focus on this customer for this project.
High A/R overdue shows that a company is selling its product to customer on credit and taking longer to collect money. It means company has less readily available cash to finance our operation. In addition, high A/R overdue will be blocked the orders and CSD cannot send the product until the payment has been made by PT Smart.
meta.goal_text: Reduce  monthly overdue A/R PT Smart to 12.8 %  by end of Nov 2017

meta.problem_text:
From January to April 2017, monthly average % non FPQ of filtration process by batch (per discharge) was 18 % 
Note: % non FPQ  filtration process  means number of  %  batch offspec acidity  in filter cake out put per month
meta.goal_text: Reduce  % non FPQ  on Filtration  Process by batch to 8% (tbc) by end of December 2017.
voc_list: filter cake output maintain the acidity contain per product specification

meta.problem_text: From August 2018 - March 2019 there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data. which results in the TECO production process being hampered and the waste in the planning process because it has to check the actual physical stock in the field every day.
meta.goal_text: Decreasing percent of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% starting November 2019.

meta.problem_text: From August 2018 - March 2019 there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data. which results in the TECO production process being hampered and the waste in the planning process because it has to check the actual physical stock in the field every day.
meta.goal_text: Decreasing percent of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% starting November 2019.

meta.problem_text: From August 2018 - March 2019 there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data. which results in the TECO production process being hampered and the waste in the planning process because it has to check the actual physical stock in the field every day.
meta.goal_text: Decreasing percent of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% starting November 2019.

meta.y_variable: Percentage of difference between physical and SAP
meta.y_operational_definition_notes:
What? Percentage of difference between physical and SAP
How?
1. Calculate the amount of BGZ receipts every day based on Delivery Noted
2. Download the data on the amount of BGZ receipts every day from SAP
3. Compare the physical acceptance of BGZ with acceptance in SAP
4. Percentage of different of physical and SAP calculated from = number of No : (number of No + Yes) x 100%

Decition Criteria:
If the quantity is different = No, if the quantity is the same = Yes

operational_definitions.decision_criteria: Target/spec from DEFINE (if known); otherwise set with owner

operational_definitions.what_measured: A key driver/companion measure that affects Y
operational_definitions.decision_criteria: Lower/Upper is better; set threshold later

meta.y_operational_definition_notes: Defect Rate = (defect units / total units) * 100, per shift

meta.problem_text:
n 2016,  27.54% of total A/R overdue all customer in ID03 with 51.8 DSO, so we will focus on this for this project. 
High A/R overdue shows that a company is selling its product to customer on credit and taking longer to collect money. It means company has less readily available cash to finance our operation. In addition, high A/R overdue will be blocked the orders and CSD cannot send the product until the payment has been made by customer
meta.goal_text: Improve the cashflow with reduce monthly overdue A/R customer to 12.8 % and monthly DSO to 50 days by end of Nov 2017.
meta.voc_list:
Head of Sales : "Reduce A/R overdue & DSO all customers in ID03, target overdue A/R 12,8% and 50 DSO for SEAP"
Sales & SCM : To many blocked SO caused by A/R overdue. They cannot fullfill customer request to deliver the goods.
